transcript:
Agent: I need to verify your medical history. Do you have any allergies?
Patient: Yes, I'm allergic to penicillin.
Agent: Thank you. Any other allergies we should know about?
Patient: No, that's the only one.

Agent: Can you confirm your current medications?
Patient: I take lisinopril for blood pressure and metformin for diabetes.
Agent: What dosages for each?
Patient: 10mg lisinopril once daily, and 500mg metformin twice daily.

Agent: When was your last physical exam?
Patient: About six months ago.
Agent: Any issues found during that exam?
Patient: Nothing major, just slightly elevated cholesterol.

Agent: Have you had any surgeries in the past?
Patient: Yes, I had my appendix removed when I was 16.
Agent: Any complications from that surgery?
Patient: No, it went smoothly.

Agent: Do you have a family history of heart disease?
Patient: Yes, my father had a heart attack at age 55.
Agent: Anyone else in your immediate family?
Patient: My older brother has high blood pressure.
